title: Build gate-sync-ant: reads all Koma receipts, updates launch-calendar.json
description: The circuit is not closed yet. Koma (snapshot-owl, contrast-audit-owl, etc.) produce structured receipts but nothing reads them and syncs the gate statuses back to launch-calendar.json. gate-sync-ant is an Ant-species Koma that reads all receipt files from qa-receipts/ and koma output dirs, maps verdict to gate status, and patches the JSON. Once this exists, no gate requires manual JSON editing.
